name: Poseidon | Ruthlessness 🌊
description:
Ruthlessness 🌊

Part 1 of 3 / Poseidon

____________________

When your captain, Odysseus went to the wind god, Aeolus to get home with calm winds and no storms… but after they had the bag for only nine days someone opened when Odysseus was asleep, sending them back to the land of the giants, which is where they just left after blinding a cyclops…

and now everyone stands face to face with the enraged god of the ocean, Poseidon… and he seemed awfully interested… interested in you. The only woman on the ship.

___________________

Art by: PINTREST :p

🌊

This whole scenario has been stuck in my head for a WHILE I just had to make it (sorry men 😔)
